description: LLmap region knowledge schema. Universal contract for region annotations across any genome (real, synthetic, fictive).

feature_vocabulary.description: Sequence-derived features. All extractors are organism-agnostic. Per-organism rules combine these into region classifications.

entries.description: Shannon entropy of 5-mer distribution in a sliding window (default 1 kb). Low = repetitive, high = mixed.
Fraction of G+C bases.
Autocorrelation-derived dominant tandem repeat period in bp. Null if none detected.
95th percentile of k-mer occurrence count within the entire reference. High = paralog/repeat-rich.
Density of reverse-complement palindromes (for inverted-terminal-repeats in viruses, etc.).
Fraction of window covered by ORF >= 300 nt. Requires codon table — universal but its parameters are organism-tunable.
Best-matching consensus motif from organism library (e.g. Alu, LINE-1, B1, P-element).

universal_region_taxonomy.description: Region types that apply across any genome. Per-organism modules add specific subtypes.

entries.description: Sequence appears exactly once in the genome. Strong specificity; mapping should be deterministic.
High repetitive content (low Shannon entropy, often AT- or GC-biased homopolymers).
Periodic structure with detectable tandem_period.
High intra-genome homology to other locations. Reads belong to ONE specific copy but map equally well to siblings.
Mobile-element-derived sequence repeated thousands of times (SINEs, LINEs, MITEs, LTRs).
Telomere / ITR / LTR — sequence flanking the linear end of the chromosome or transposable element.
Spindle-attachment region. Often built from a satellite tandem repeat.
ORF-containing region with codon usage matching the organism's coding standard.
Coding-like but with stop-codon insertions, frameshifts, or transposon-disruption.
Organism-specific or user-defined. Module supplies its own mapping_hints.

mapping_hint_vocabulary.description: Effects an annotation can have on the chain-DP scoring at runtime.

entries.description: Scales the global MinimizerIndex max_occ for anchors in this region.
Scales the effective minimizer k for this region (>1 = coarser, smaller k effective).
Force the chain extractor to emit top-N chains instead of collapsing to one.
Require an external PSV catalog or per-read LLM call to pick the right copy.

module_layout.description: Each organism module must contain at least the following files.
required: regions/*.json (one file per region the module recognises; each adheres to region_entry schema)
optional: consensus_motifs/*.fa (FASTA of well-known motifs for consensus_match feature)
codon_table.json (organism codon usage table for orf_density)
